parameters.query:
SELECT 
  id,
  contact_phone,
  contact_name,
  title,
  date_time,
  purpose,
  location,
  status,
  scheduler_phone,
  created_at,
  user_id
FROM meetings
WHERE contact_phone = $1
  AND status = 'pending_confirmation'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 5;

UPDATE meetings
SET 
  status = 'scheduled',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $1
RETURNING id, status, updated_at;

UPDATE meetings
SET 
  status = 'cancelled',
  rejection_reason = $2,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $1
RETURNING id, status, rejection_reason, updated_at;
DELETE FROM meetings WHERE id = $1 RETURNING id;
